TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Shane_Battier, title = Shane_Battier, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shane_Battier} }

S.FORM: Shane Battier sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 9, Shane Battier, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Shane Battier sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 9, Shane Battier, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: s~ɕħane βattier s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, s~ɕħane βattier, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
